# nuxt-banana Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-03-06

## Active Technologies
- TypeScript (strict mode), Vue 3 (Composition API, `<script setup>`) + Nuxt 4.3+, @nuxt/ui v4.4+, @nuxtjs/supabase v2.0.3, @pinia/nuxt v0.11.3, TailwindCSS 4 (dev)
- Supabase PostgreSQL (`gallery_items` table), Supabase Storage (`images` bucket) (dev)
- Supabase PostgreSQL (`gallery_items`, `profiles`, `roles` tables), Supabase Storage (`images` bucket) (dev)

- TypeScript (strict), Vue 3.5+, Nuxt 4.3+ + @nuxt/ui v4.4+, @nuxtjs/supabase v2.0.3, @pinia/nuxt v0.11.3, TailwindCSS 4 (dev)

## Project Structure

```text
backend/
frontend/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test; npm run lint

## Code Style

TypeScript (strict), Vue 3.5+, Nuxt 4.3+: Follow standard conventions
